=# :bar_chart: Social Media Content Package: [Article Title]
## :memo: Article Analysis Summary
*Original Title:* [Article title]  
*Word Count:* [Approximate count]  
*Complexity Level:* [Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced]  
*Target Audience:* [Specific audience segment]
### Key Insights Extracted:
- *Insight 1:* [Main takeaway]
- *Insight 2:* [Supporting idea]
- *Insight 3:* [Market implication]

---

# A) 6 x Social Media Posts
## Post 1 - X (Twitter)
*Platform:* X (Twitter) – 280 characters max  
*Hook:* [First 50 characters that stop the scroll]  
*Body:* [Core message – total ≤ 280 chars]  
*CTA:* [Action prompt]  
*Hashtags:* #FinanceTips #InvestSmart #WealthBuilding  
*Visual Suggestion:* [Brief description]
---
## Post 2 - LinkedIn
*Platform:* LinkedIn – 150–300 characters  
*Hook:* [Professional grabber]  
*Body:* [Insightful content]  
*CTA:* [Engagement question]  
*Hashtags:* #FinancialLiteracy #ProfessionalDevelopment #MarketInsights  
*Visual Suggestion:* [Infographic or chart]
---
[Continue for Posts 3–6, alternating between X and LinkedIn]

---

# B) 4 x Instagram Carousel Slides
*Theme:* [Overarching idea]  
*Visual Style:* [Color palette, layout, tone]
### Slide 1 - Title
*Headline:* *[Main title]* *Subtext:* [Supporting line]  
*Visuals:* [Suggestions]
### Slide 2 - Key Concept
*Main Point:* *[Teaching point]* *Supporting Points:* - [Example 1]  - [Example 2]  
*Visuals:* [Diagram/chart suggestion]
### Slide 3 - Deep Dive
*Focus:* *[Expanded concept]* *Breakdown:* - [Step 1]  - [Step 2]  - [Step 3]  
*Visuals:* [Infographic suggestion]
### Slide 4 - CTA / Summary
*Key Takeaway:* *[One memorable sentence]* *Action Step:* [Call to action]  
*Engagement:* [Comment question]  
*Visuals:* [CTA design idea]

---

# C) 2 x Community Polls
## Poll 1 - YouTube
*Context:* [Brief setup]  
*Question:* *[Engaging financial question]* *Options:* - [Option 1]  - [Option 2]  - [Option 3]  - [Option 4]  
*Follow-up:* [Planned post or insight from results]
---
## Poll 2 - LinkedIn
*Context:* [Professional setup]  
*Question:* *[Industry-relevant prompt]* *Options:* - [Option 1]  - [Option 2]  - [Option 3]  - [Option 4]  
*Follow-up:* [How insights will be used]

---

# D) 4 x Live Stream Topics
## Live Stream Topic 1
*Title:* *[Compelling name]* *Duration:* 15–20 min  
*Target Audience:* [Specific viewers]  
*Synopsis:* [2–3 lines explaining the key learning and relevance]
### Talking Points
- *Opening Hook (0–1 min):* [Strong question or stat]  
- *Context (1–3 min):* [Why it matters now]  
- *Main (3–12 min):* - Point 1: [Detail]  - Point 2: [Example]  - Point 3: [Mistake to avoid]  
- *Interactive (12–15 min):* [Audience Q&A]  
- *Closing (15–20 min):* [CTA / recap]

---

# E) 2 x Short-Form Videos (30–60s)
## Short Video 1
*Title:* *[Catchy hook]* *Duration:* 45 sec  
*Platform:* Reels / Shorts / TikTok  
*Concept:* [1-sentence concept summary]
### Script
[0–3s] Hook: "[Open with question]"  
[3–8s] Context: "[Problem setup]"  
[8–20s] Main Content: "[Key insight]"  
[20–30s] Example: "[Scenario]"  
[30–40s] Application: "[Action]"  
[40–45s] CTA: "[Engagement question]"

---

# Implementation Guide
## Recommended Posting Schedule
1. *Week 1:* - Monday: IG Carousel  - Tuesday: Poll 1  - Wednesday: X/LinkedIn Posts 1–2  - Thursday: Short Video 1  - Friday: Live Stream 1  
2. *Week 2:* - Monday: X/LinkedIn Posts 3–4  - Tuesday: Poll 2  - Wednesday: Short Video 2  - Thursday: X/LinkedIn Posts 5–6  - Friday: Live Stream 2
---
## Quality Assurance Checklist
- [ ] Financial data accurate  
- [ ] Character limits respected  
- [ ] Visual cues actionable  
- [ ] Each section delivers standalone value  
- [ ] Clear CTA in every post  
- [ ] Relevant hashtag mix  
- [ ] Balanced tone of authority and clarity  
- [ ] Include disclaimers if necessary  
---

## FINAL JSON OUTPUT STRUCTURE (MANDATORY)

The AI must now wrap all the generated markdown content into a single JSON object.

The structure **must** be an array named `"social_media_content"`, where each element represents a distinct piece of content (including the Analysis/Guide summary) and uses the mandatory placeholder variables:

```json
{
  "social_media_content": [
    {
      "blog_post_id": "{{ $json.key }}",
      "article_url": "{{ $('WordPress - Create Draft1').item.json.link }}",
      "platform": "Article Analysis Summary",
      "content": "[Generated Trello Markdown for Analysis Summary here]"
    },
    {
      "blog_post_id": "{{ $json.key }}",
      "article_url": "{{ $('WordPress - Create Draft1').item.json.link }}",
      "platform": "X (Post 1)",
      "content": "[Generated Trello Markdown for X Post 1 here]"
    },
    // ... all other generated content pieces follow this exact structure, including distinct platform labels (e.g., 'Instagram Carousel', 'YouTube Poll', 'Implementation Guide') ...
  ]
}

parameters.content: Pull Content from email >> Create post in Wordpress >> Create Jira Issue
Wait and check if a the post is already pushed in Jira
Get attachment from Jira >> create feature image and wordpress >> attach image to post >> set post LIVE
Pick content from Jira >> create content
Pick specific content to be dispatched

This n8n workflow initiates when an approved email is received, cleans the content to create a draft post in WordPress and a corresponding Jira issue for review, then concurrently uses an AI model to generate and distribute social media content as Trello cards, finally waiting for a manual "PUSH" status change in Jira to trigger the publishing of the post.
